description: Manifest of OpenBody minimum-core conformance vectors (SPEC §8.3). A conformance runner loads each file and checks the assertion for its `kind`. Covers the §8.3 minimum-core list; grows with the extended corpus (CORPUS.md).

coverage.scoring_kinds: reps (scalar-vs-target, resistance-set), time, distance, energy, continuous (continuous-endurance) — all five covered
coverage.core_structures: resistance set, AMRAP/EMOM round-scheme blocks, continuous endurance — covered (§3.1)
coverage.round_trip: opaque ExerciseRef, unknown extension, unknown open token, tombstone, supersession — covered
coverage.sampleArray: regular (frequencyHz) + irregular (offsets), single- + multi-channel, null dropped sample — covered

todo: for_time scheme block; phasePattern (tempo/breath); relativeToThreshold load (%1RM) resolution; multi-participant/synchronized; statusPeriod + ThresholdProfile records
pin exact `expected` canonical forms on normalization vectors (now that openbody-ts can emit them)
extended activity-coverage corpus (CORPUS.md): Highland games, kabaddi, freediving, isokinetic, climbing send/attempt, etc.
